source_excerpt: International sales were $24.1 billion, an increase of 4.6%, which included operational growth of 2.9% and a positive currency impact of 1.7%.
notes: The claim states international sales 'declined 4.6%' but the source explicitly states international sales were 'an increase of 4.6%' — the direction is directly contradicted. The dollar figure of $24.1 billion matches, but the reversal of the growth direction (decline vs. increase) makes this unsupported.
